steps.title: Find the consumer price
steps.content:
The consumer price is 280% of the purchase price:
$$4.50 \times 2.80 = 12.60$$
The consumer price is \$12.60.

steps.title: Apply the 65% discount
steps.content:
65% off means the customer pays 35% of the consumer price (100% - 65% = 35%):
$$12.60 \times 0.35 = 4.41$$
The discounted price of each remaining notebook is \$4.41.
